{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044539D3BD9D5E2FFA005E3116"}"},"total":8},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7587386760923497240","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"只要你们能熬过前面几张，后面很好看的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766578700,"group_id":"7577778859869752344","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"。。。。。。。。。。。。。。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+3/CdHIz7CNnnuCAgE+8NU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"650566450817336","user_name":"天镇的天龙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"650566450817336","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7577778859869752344","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统都市爽文】 
宿醉醒来，百亿商业巨鳄苏白猛然发现，自己回到了2006年的初中教室！
身份？班里倒数第一的网瘾废柴，正被老班骂得狗血淋头。
卡里？上辈子那张存着**一亿**现金的银行卡，硬核陪他一起回来了！
“苏白，你再不去戒网瘾，这书就别读了！”班主任怒吼。
苏白笑了：“呵，剧本我熟。卡里一亿现金，我还需要你教我做事？”
面对势利校花的嫌弃、富二代的挑衅，苏白直接反手买下学校附近最好的商铺。
“谁说重生就要低调？老子这辈子就是要玩票大的！”
且看苏白如何用这笔启动资金，逆转命运，提前布局移动互联网，玩转地产，收割未来，让曾经错过的人和钱，统统喊他爸爸！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o70983e26b0aa943482eb690cea2e36e5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"乘风的猪","author_id":"","book_id":"7577778859869752344","book_name":"带着一亿现金，重生回初中时代！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":263,"name":"都市种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=263&name=都市种田&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7578516781145260568","read_count":"596","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"243350"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"103","tags":"都市种田,都市,神豪,重生,校花,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o70983e26b0aa943482eb690cea2e36e5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309939&x-signature=OPRAOCsx3egLAn%2F1wItL2nxxkjA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2914153921781162","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"39"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044539D3BD9D5E2FFA005E3116"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"}
